query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS shadow_override_monitor (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  user_name VARCHAR(100),
  tenant_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default',

  -- Rolling window metrics (computed at scan time, never recomputed retroactively)
  overrides_24h INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  overrides_7d INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  overrides_30d INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  total_overrides INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,

  -- Pattern flags (observation only — never used to block)
  unusual_pattern_detected TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  pattern_notes TEXT,

  -- The exact output shape required by spec
  override_activity_detected TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  recommended_action VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  mode VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'shadow',

  -- Timestamps
  last_scanned_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  first_override_at BIGINT,
  last_override_at BIGINT,

  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL,

  INDEX idx_som_user (user_id),
  INDEX idx_som_tenant (tenant_id),
  INDEX idx_som_scanned (last_scanned_at),
  INDEX idx_som_activity (override_activity_detected)
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute

  overrides_24h INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,

  overrides_30d INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  total_overrides INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,

  -- Pattern flags (observation only — never used to block)
  unusual_pattern_detected TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,

  -- The exact output shape required by spec
  override_activity_detected TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  recommended_action VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  mode VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'shadow',

  -- Timestamps
  last_scanned_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  first_override_at BIGINT,
  last_override_at BIGINT,

  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL,

  INDEX idx_som_user (user_id),
  INDEX idx_som_tenant (tenant_id),
  INDEX idx_som_scanned (last_scanned_at),
  INDEX idx_som_activity (override_activity_detected)
);
